hero.introText: I'm Alejandro Romero Stankevich, a junior web developer based in Catalonia, Spain. I have finished a Higher Degree in Web Development and I'm currently building personal web projects with modern technologies.

exp.description_chatter: Full-stack social platform developed in 14 days. Click to view the LinkedIn post with test users and demo.
exp.description_wannapop: Wallapop clone developed with Flask. Click to view the LinkedIn post with instructions and test users.
exp.description: A mobile app designed as an interactive guide for a unique museum and its memory plaques. It addresses the lack of internet access at the site by providing offline access to all content. Features include QR scanning, multi-language support, and a responsive UI. Tech stack: Vue 3, Capacitor, TailwindCSS. Click to view more on LinkedIn.
exp.company1: Higher Degree in Web Dev - Instituto Joaquim Mir
exp.description1: I have finished the Higher Degree Training Cycle in Web Application Development (DAW) at Instituto Joaquim Mir. Intensive training in full-stack development, agile methodologies, and application deployment.
exp.description2: On GitHub you can see all my updates and almost my entire learning journey, including my contributions and how my skills have evolved over time.

aboutMe.p1: At 15, I studied Bakery and Pastry in Belarus. At 17, I moved to Spain — without having everything figured out, but eager to build a future. At 21, I enrolled in the Higher Technician in Web Application Development (DAW).
aboutMe.p2: Now, at 22, I have finished my studies and am ready to launch my career in the industry. Here is where I stand out: I have the technical mindset of a developer, but I also thrive in communication and coordination.
aboutMe.p3: I am looking for opportunities as a Junior Developer or related roles. I want to use my trilingual skills and technical background to bridge the gap between code, products, and people.

contact.intro: Beyond code, I am driven by curiosity and the desire to create products that make a difference. I am actively looking to join a team where I can contribute, learn, and grow. Have a challenge for me? Let's talk!
